then enrich only the current page (max 100) for membership data.
Membership KPI is approximate (from current page).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: replace rawRow scoring with direct per-range field count scan

The rawRow-scoring approach (header:1) kept failing: for this XLSX the scoring
always picked row 0 (bestHeaderRow=0), reverting to the original 0-fields result.
The root cause was unreliable SheetJS behavior when reading merged cells with
header:1 on certain XLSX layouts.

New approach: directly try rows 0–9 as the candidate header row (using the same
sheet_to_json + defval:'' path as the final parse) and pick the row that yields
the highest count of real normalized field names. This is unambiguous — if row 3
gives 8 real column names and row 0 gives 1, we pick row 3.

Early exit when bestFieldCount ≥ 5 (clearly a real header found).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(workflow): UPSERT conversation no inbound — cria conversa se não existir

Quando a clínica responde ao primeiro outbound, não existe gk_conversation ainda.
O UPDATE anterior falhava e conversationId chegava null no INSERT gk_messages.
Agora usa INSERT ... ON CONFLICT para criar ou atualizar atomicamente,
e o SELECT final sempre retorna conversation_id via LEFT JOIN.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

opus-2026-03-07-S39: u_T(m) size-weighted independence polynomial identity

Key discovery: u_T(m) = sum_j sw(j) * m^{n-2j} where sw(j) counts
size-weighted independent sets with total half-excess j.
Q_T(w) has all real non-positive roots (exhaustive n=5, sampled n=7).
This is STRONGER than I(Omega,x) real-rootedness.
Corrected false identity Q_T(w) ≠ w^m * I(Omega, 2/w) in general.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: WCAG AA contrast ratios across all 6 light themes

Classic light: primary #24A8E0 -> #0D74A0 (2.7:1 -> 5.2:1),
  secondary #0891b2 -> #077d9a (3.7:1 -> 4.8:1)
Warm sepia: secondary #cc7a30 -> #9d5d1c (3.3:1 -> 5.2:1)
All 6 light themes: darkened outline colors to reach 5.0:1+

Adds scripts/contrast-audit.mjs for automated WCAG checking.
Result: 0 failures, 3 acceptable large-text warnings, 165 passes.

commit.message:
Fix in-game XP bar to show actual level progress

The XP bar during gameplay was showing session word progress
(1/10, 2/10...) instead of actual level XP progress. Now it
shows how far the player is towards the next level — same
calculation as the menu XP bar. This means:

- Bar starts at correct position when re-entering a game
- Bar updates in real-time as XP is earned per correct word
- Bar reflects accumulated XP from all previous sessions
- Word progress still shown as "Wort 1/10" text above

commit.message:
Handle transient network errors gracefully

Retry failed requests up to 3 times with 5s backoff, and catch
URLError/OSError at the top level so DNS blips on GitHub Actions
exit 0 instead of failing the workflow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix checkout success handler body parsing and add full logging

The previous formData().catch().clone().json() pattern silently failed because
the body stream was consumed on the first read attempt. Now reads as raw text
first, then parses as JSON or form-urlencoded. Removed signature gate from
success redirect — just fulfill if order_status is approved. Added console.log
at every step for Vercel log debugging.

Add lesson-04-antenna-types-tour.html (2234 lines, 14 visuals)

Built from curriculum/antennas/unit-1/lesson-04-antenna-types-tour.md.
Covers 6 antenna families: monopole, collinear, loop, Yagi-Uda, patch, dish.

Visuals:
- V1: dipole vs monopole SVG (current distribution + toroid/half-toroid)
- V2: elevation polar plot canvas (cv-elevation, dipole vs monopole)
- V3: collinear E-plane comparison canvas (cv-collinear, 3 patterns + H-plane inset)
- V4: small loop SVG (top view + side view with magnetic axis)
- V5: dipole vs loop pattern comparison SVG (nulls/maxima colour coded)
- V6: DF diagram SVG (signal source + loop 2 positions + bar graphs)
- V7: Yagi labelled parts SVG
- V8: Yagi H-plane comparison canvas (cv-yagi-hplane, dipole vs Yagi)
- V9: Yagi E+H polar canvases (cv-yagi-eplane + cv-yagi-hplane2)
- V10: patch cross-section + top view SVG
- V11: patch broadside pattern SVG
- V12: dish ray diagram SVG
- V13: dish comparison SVG (small vs large)
- V14: directivity spectrum SVG
- radiation-3d-v5 iframe embed (interactives/, ?antenna=dipole&ui=standard)

Self-check Parts A-D. Nav: lesson-03 ← → lesson-05.

commit.message:
fix(demo): heartbeat provider, Haiku prompt, ESLint CI (#230, #231, #232) (#233)

* fix(demo): heartbeat provider override, Haiku prompt, ESLint CI (#230, #231, #232)

- ESLint: suppress no-non-null-assertion in test files (#232)
- Heartbeat: treat loops as run-scoped — abort and restart on provider
  change in /api/start (#230)
- Prompt: strengthen system prompt as behavioural mitigation for weaker
  models that ask for confirmation instead of calling tools (#231)

Closes #230, closes #231, closes #232

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(demo-ui): fail fast when relay unreachable, stop halts heartbeats

Three fixes:

1. /api/start now checks relay health before starting agents. Returns
   a 502 with a clear error message if the relay is unreachable,
   instead of letting agents loop endlessly with "fetch failed."

2. New /api/stop endpoint that aborts heartbeat loops without
   restarting them. The Stop button was calling /api/reset which
   aborts then immediately restarts heartbeats via
   setupAndStartHeartbeats().

3. Frontend shows the error in the protocol panel via a new
   VaultCardManager.renderError() method, with Stop/New Run buttons.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(demo-ui): show relay error detail, check relay before side effects

- renderError now uses addStatus (always visible) instead of addLine
  inside a collapsed body — the error message was hidden behind the
  click-to-expand card behavior
- Move relay health check before provider override and heartbeat
  restart in /api/start — prevents wasted heartbeat restarts and
  recording when the relay is unreachable

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(demo-ui): pass abort signal into LLM burst loop

runLLMBurst now accepts an optional AbortSignal and checks it before
each turn. Previously, Stop/Reset would abort the heartbeat while-loop
but any in-flight burst would run all remaining turns to completion,
causing events to keep appearing after the user clicked Stop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(relay): dev-skip PolicyRegistry falls back on unknown hash (#234)

When the relay runs in dev-skip mode, the PolicyRegistry only contains
a single dev-skip policy. Contracts from the demo UI send a real policy
hash that doesn't match, causing PolicyNotAvailable errors. Add a
dev_fallback flag (only set by dev_skip()) that falls back to the
default policy instead of erroring on hash miss.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Use absolute dates in Core Memory output, not relative time

Changed formatRecency() from "today"/"2 days ago" to absolute dates
like "(2026-03-03)". Relative time is wrong for cached contexts —
a chatbot may consume the output hours or days later, making "today"
stale and misleading. Absolute dates let the consuming AI calculate
recency itself.

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: Happy <yesreply@happy.engineering>

feat(ai): improve memory persistence and auto-summarize on history clear

- Raise MAX_MEMORY_CHARS from 2000 to 4000

  schedule, preferences, emotional context, milestones) so AI captures
  context proactively instead of waiting for "important" moments
- Add fetchCompletion() to groqService for non-streaming calls
- Auto-summarize conversation into memory before clearing history:
  clears immediately for fast UX, then fires background Groq call to
  extract 8-12 key facts and prepend them as a [Prior conversation summary]
  block — survives history clears, maintains context across resets

fixes (#12)

* Add Procfile for web server configuration

* Update package.json

* security: fix XSS, CORS wildcard, and unsafe URL vulnerabilities

- Add _esc() / _isSafeUrl() helpers to widgets.js and templates.js
- Escape all API-sourced data before innerHTML insertion (weather, cron jobs, activity, quick links, dir browser, template gallery)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* security: add bulletproof server-side session authentication

- Adds DASHBOARD_PASSWORD env var to enable server-side auth
- All routes protected with HttpOnly + SameSite=Strict session cookie
- Timing-safe password comparison (HMAC-based, no timing leaks)
- Rate limiting: 5 attempts per IP per 15 minutes
- Session tokens: 64-char random hex with 24h TTL (SESSION_TTL_HOURS to configure)
- Automatic session cleanup every hour
- Self-contained login.html with dark theme
- Backward-compatible: auth disabled if DASHBOARD_PASSWORD not set

commit.message:
perf: fix NO_LCP — heroLcp never set to opacity:0 by carousel JS

Chrome removes an element from LCP candidates when opacity changes to 0.
The previous carousel goTo() called allSlides[0].style.opacity = '0' each
time it advanced past position 0, invalidating the LCP candidate.

New approach: heroLcp stays at opacity:1 permanently (never touched by JS).
Only slide1 and slide2 animate between opacity:0 and opacity:1. Position 0
is achieved by fading both slides to opacity:0, revealing heroLcp underneath.
Also fixes: slides now fade to opacity:1 (not 0.7) when active.

commit.message:
feat(brain): intent.js 增加 domain 检测 + owner_role 映射 (#616) (#625)

* feat(brain): intent.js 增加 domain 检测 + owner_role 映射 (Stage 0.5)

新增 DOMAIN_KEYWORDS（10 个领域关键词表）、DOMAIN_OWNER_MAP（domain→role 映射）
和 detectDomain() 函数，根据输入文本检测领域并返回 domain+owner_role。

优先级规则：agent_ops > quality > security > coding（任意匹配即覆盖低优先级）
全大写英文缩写（PR/CI/API）使用词边界匹配，避免子串误判（如 PR 不匹配 PRD）。

parseIntent() 返回值新增 domain、ownerRole、domainKeywords 字段。
parseAndCreate() INSERT 写入 domain 和 owner_role 列。

同步新增 migration 134 为 tasks 表添加 domain/owner_role 列，
更新 selfcheck.js EXPECTED_SCHEMA_VERSION 为 '134'。

新增 detectDomain 单元测试 15 个，覆盖 5 个成功标准用例及优先级规则。
